description: A citizen reports water gushing from the street, indicating a likely water main break.

nodes.task_description: Gather the exact location of the break.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gets the address and cross-street of the break.

nodes.task_description: Recognize the urgency of the situation and escalate it immediately.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent flags the service request as an emergency.

nodes.task_description: Create an emergency work order and dispatch the on-call crew.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a work order and immediately dispatches a crew to the location.
